project: Ink CLI Terminal Rendering Parity — Web-Derived Completion
description: Implement terminal-native Ink JSON, markdown, and syntax rendering that follows Web semantic roles without importing Web components.

userStories.title: Implement Ink inline JSON token rendering
userStories.description: As an SSH operator, I want function-call arguments to be scannable like Web inline JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline function-call rendering emits separate token roles for function name, parens, keys, strings, literals, punctuation, and collapsed collection markers
Nested object/array values show disclosure markers rather than unbounded inline dumps
Snapshots cover color-enabled and NO_COLOR output for nested JSON with long strings and secrets

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-18: PASS. Implemented Ink inline function-call JSON token rendering with Web-derived function-name/parens/key/string/literal/punctuation roles, root expanded markers (`▾{`/`▾[`), nested collapsed collection markers (`▸{...}`/`▸[...]`), explicit long-string disclosure (`... (+N chars)`), and redaction before display. Added render/token tests for color-enabled roles and NO_COLOR-readable text. Evidence tier: focused renderer/unit snapshots plus deterministic fake/demo real Ink TUI PTY path. Docker validation: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm test. PTY artifacts: /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-color and /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-nocolor. Classification: deterministic fake/demo source through real TUI path, not live provider. Web preservation: no Web Compact Terminal or shared src/session-ui production files changed; CLI-only renderer changes and fake demo/test updates only. Commit: fd634f6.

userStories.title: Implement Ink detail JSON wells
userStories.description: As a power user, I want JSON details to be readable without leaving the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: Detail rendering parses object/array values and JSON-looking text output into pretty terminal JSON blocks
Leading status/meta text before JSON is preserved as metadata
Default detail JSON depth/items are bounded and indicate additional nested content where applicable
Full detail access remains available through expanded row/details behavior

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-18: PASS. Added Ink detail JSON well formatting for raw object/array values and JSON-looking text with leading metadata preserved as `Meta:` lines. Expanded details now render bounded `┌ JSON`/`└ JSON` wells with depth/item/key limits and nested disclosure markers while keeping source row details available through expansion. Tests cover parsed metadata, nested arrays/objects, redaction, and JSON wells in expanded PTY details. Validation: npm run build; focused node --test suite; npm run typecheck; npm test; PTY color artifact /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-color. Web preservation: CLI-only production changes; no Web UI/shared terminal model production changes. Commit: fd634f6.

userStories.title: Improve Ink markdown structural rendering
userStories.description: As a user, I want assistant answers and reasoning to preserve headings, lists, code, and quotes.
acceptanceCriteria: Ink markdown renderer preserves headings, paragraphs, bullets, ordered lists, nested list indentation, blockquotes, inline code, fenced code, tables, and links as terminal-native text
Reasoning markdown uses reasoning tone/markers distinct from assistant prose
Snapshots cover complex markdown and narrow wrapping without `… truncated`

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-18: PASS. Improved Ink markdown rendering to preserve headings, compact paragraph gaps, unordered/ordered/nested lists, blockquotes, inline code, links, tables, fenced code boundaries, bash fences, JSON fences, and reasoning tones through terminal-native line tokens. Added complex markdown fixture coverage and deterministic demo markdown output for PTY review. Validation: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm test. PTY artifacts show markdown/list/table/code output at /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-color and NO_COLOR fallback at /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-nocolor. Web preservation: no Web Compact Terminal changes. Commit: fd634f6.

userStories.title: Align bash and code tokenization with Web roles
userStories.description: As an operator, I want shell commands and code snippets to be quickly scannable.
acceptanceCriteria: Bash command tokens use Web-derived roles for command, flags, env/variables, quoted strings, paths, pipes/redirects/control operators, and default text
JSON fenced code receives JSON token roles or a documented terminal-native approximation
Unknown code fences fall back to safe monospaced text without breaking layout

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-18: PASS. Added Ink bash tokenizer with Web-derived roles for command, flags, env/variables, quoted strings, paths, pipes/control operators, and default text, and applied JSON token roles to JSON fenced code lines. Unknown fences remain safe monospaced text. Existing shared execution command bash tokens remain unchanged. Validation: focused renderer token tests, npm run build, npm run typecheck, npm test, and PTY artifacts /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-color plus /tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-nocolor. Secrets were rejected in artifacts and snapshots. Web preservation: CLI-only production changes. Commit: fd634f6.

userStories.title: Capture JSON and markdown PTY evidence
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want terminal artifacts showing rich structured content, not plain dumps.
acceptanceCriteria: PTY scenario renders a function call with nested JSON, an expanded detail JSON payload, markdown with code/list/table, and a bash command
Artifacts show color-enabled output and a NO_COLOR or ASCII-safe fallback
Artifact assertions verify secrets are redacted and visible text is not character-truncated

Web UI preservation gate passes: Web Compact Terminal visual/behavioral render logic remains unchanged unless the story explicitly documents user-approved Web behavior changes; shared `src/session-ui/**` changes include Web regression evidence.
Implementation does not import Web DOM/Tailwind/lucide components into CLI modules
Secrets are redacted in previews, details, fixtures, snapshots, and PTY artifacts
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
When marking passes true, notes include commands run, evidence tier, artifact paths where applicable, and fake/demo/mocked/real classification
userStories.notes: 2026-05-18: PASS. Captured JSON/markdown PTY evidence through the real `pibo tui:sessions --demo` Ink TUI path. Color artifact `/tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-color` renders a nested JSON function call (`search_files` with `▾{` and `▸[...]`), markdown heading/list/table/quote, fenced bash and JSON code, expanded details with `┌ JSON`, and rejects json-inline-secret/json-demo-secret/fixture-secret-value. NO_COLOR fallback artifact `/tmp/pibo-pty-json-markdown-us011-nocolor` verifies the same text markers remain readable without color. Commands also passed: npm run build; node --test test/cli-ui-ink-renderer.test.mjs test/terminal-parity-fixtures.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs; npm run typecheck; npm test. Evidence tier: deterministic fake/demo source through real PTY path, not live provider. Web preservation gate satisfied: no Web Compact Terminal or src/session-ui production changes. Commit: fd634f6.
